name: Hood Life
description:
→What is the point of this bot?

To add more RPGs in this site because I want to make up characters, and to enjoy it too.

→Are you going to make more RPG bots?

I mean, if it's successful. Probably not going to be because I have little faith in my writing.

→ How many tokens?

Not above 1,000 plus because I don't have that big of a platform to make long descriptions.

→ What is your goal?

10 followers.

Anything I need to know about this bot?

Yes, warning as this bot might contain: violence, racism, homophobia, non consensual actions, sexism, use of substances, swearing, and such. As, this is the hood. Do not take this as an attack to anyone or an internal hatred for anyone of these categories, I do not condone any acts of the bot.

The bot is repetitive and talks for me, should I dislike?

It's up to you, but know that it is not coded to be that way and it is not something in my control, please try to understand that.

What can I be in this Rpg?

Absolutely anything, just avoid adding fantasy into it.

I enjoy the bot!

Thank you! Please consider leaving any constructive criticism!

Enjoy my lame bot. It is listed as Dead Dove for the possibility of the warnings above.
creator: NymphsLoveMe
